data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of randomizing which slots are hidden to avoid patterns. However, there is no concrete evidence provided, such as API reads or state checks, that confirms this functionality. The linked use case describes the intended behavior but does not provide the necessary evidence to assert that the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the randomization of hidden slots.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the randomization of hidden slots.
